――娼館。<br>受付をつとめるルディアの前に、何人もの男がつめかけていた。:
—The Brothel. Several men were crowding in front of Ludia at the
reception desk.
ええっ！？ メレムちゃんの予約、とれないのかよ！？: What! I can't get a reservation with Merem!
申し訳ありません、<br>メレムさんの予約は先まですべて埋まっていまして……: I'm sorry, but Merem is fully booked for the foreseeable future...
なら、キャンセルとかは？<br>空きが出るまで待つよ！: Then, what about cancellations? I'll wait until a spot opens up!
キャンセル待ちの方もたくさんいまして、<br>お客様にご案内することはまずないか: There's a long waiting list, so I'm afraid we can't accommodate you...
メレムさんに占って欲しかったんだけどなあ。: I really wanted Merem to do a reading for me...
悔しげに去っていく客たちに、<br>ルディアは小さくため息をついた。:
The customers left looking disappointed, and Ludia let out a small
sigh.
メレムさんご希望の方には、なんとか帰ってもらえたわね。<br>それにしても、こん:
I managed to send off those who specifically wanted Merem. But still,
to have so many come...
メレムさんの占いがよく当たるのは知ってるけど、<br>わざわざ娼館で高いお金を払:
I know Merem's fortune-telling is accurate, but why would they pay
top dollar to get a reading at a brothel?
こんばんは、ルディアさん。<br>本日のお仕事に参りました。: Good evening, Ludia. I've come for today's work.
ああ、メレムさん。<br>今日も大人気で、事前予約ですべて埋まっていますよ。:
Ah, Merem. You're as popular as ever—everything's fully booked with
advance reservations.
あら、そんなにですか？<br>やっぱり新しい占いが人気なんでしょうか。:
Oh my, that many? I suppose it's because of the new fortune-telling
method?
新しい占いを始めたのね。<br>わざわざ娼館で受けるだなんて、どんな占いなんです:
So you've started a new fortune-telling method. What kind of reading
is it that people would specifically come to a brothel for?
その方の未来を正確に見通せる素晴らしい占いなんですが、<br>実は……お客様の性:
It's a wonderful reading that can see the client's future, but... I need
to touch their intimate area, so I can only do it here.
ああ……そういう……。<br>皆さん、それが目的なのね。: Ah... I see... So that's what they're after.
それに、占いにはプライベートな要素を含みますので、<br>完全に２人きりになれる:
Also, since fortune-telling involves private matters, this place where
we can be alone is perfect for it.
いつからそんな新しい占いを編み出したの？<br>もしかして……司令官君！？:
When did you come up with that new method? Don't tell me... The
Commander?
は、はい……。あの、実はこないだ司令官とエッチをした時、<br>司令官の近い未来:
Well, yes... Actually, when I slept with the Commander the other day, I
saw his near future very clearly...
それ以来、この占い方が最も正確に相手の方の<br>未来を占える方法だと気が付いて:
Since then, I realized that this method is the most accurate way to
read someone's future...
だからって娼館のお客様相手に身体を張らなくても……:
Even so, you don't have to go to such lengths for the customers at
the brothel...
初めはもちろん抵抗はあったんですが、<br>やはり誰かを正しい未来に導くのが我々:
Of course I was hesitant at first, but guiding people toward the right
future is our mission as fortune tellers...
でも……不幸な未来が見えてしまったらどうするんです？<br>望まぬ結果になった不:
But what if you see an unfortunate future? Won't they take their
disappointment out on you if the result isn't what they wanted?
そういう場合は注意点だけをお伝えして、<br>前向きにすごしていただけるように努:
In such cases, I only tell them what to watch out for, and try to help
them stay positive.
占い師の仕事はただ未来を見せるのではなく、<br>お客様が良い人生を手繰り寄せる:
A fortune teller's job isn't just to show the future; it's to help
customers draw a good life toward themselves.
カウンセラーのような、大変なお仕事なのね、占い師って。: So being a fortune teller is a tough job, like a counselor.
あ、あの……メレムさんで予約したんですが……: Ah, um... I made a reservation with Merem...
はい、いらっしゃいませ。<br>メレムさん、ご予約のお客様です。: Yes, welcome. Merem, this is the customer with the reservation.
占い師メレムです。<br>……本日はよろしくお願いします。:
I am Merem, the fortune teller... I look forward to working with you
today.
さて、本日占いたいことはなんでしょうか？: Now, what would you like me to read for you today?
明日、新しく発見された階層の調査に向かうんです。<br>それがなんだか不安で、ど:
Tomorrow I'm heading out to explore a newly discovered stratum. I'm
feeling uneasy, so I had to get a reading...
なるほど……それはご不安でしょう。<br>ご安心ください。どんな未来が見えるか、:
I see... That must be worrisome. Rest assured, I'll perform a thorough
divination to see what the future holds.
ありがとうございます！<br>それで、その……できれば、よく当たる占いをお願いし:
Thank you! And, well... if possible, I'd like to request the more
accurate reading...
……はい、分かっています。<br>私の身体にも負担がかかるので特別料金を頂いてい:
... Yes, I understand. However, it does place a strain on my body, so I
charge a special fee. Is that acceptable?
ありがとうございます。<br>では、早速占っていきましょうか……: Thank you. Then, shall we begin the reading right away...?
